CREATIVE

March-ing forwards

its a sturday morning. i didn’t even brush my teeth yet. so i took a break for couple days after applying to the science gallery bengaluru’s experimentor programme. that application lasted for around 5 days, where i paused the self-study. i need to get bacck to it now.

its good to tell the story of past feww weeks so that i have a meaning to tell myself, so that i can wake up in the monring without uncertainity, so that I do not lie on my bed for couple hours before waking up…

so march was supposed to be all about finishing terence tao’s analysis volume II. i also finally made a late decision to apply for the SGB experimentor programme. anyway, it’s time to get back now…

10 days left in this month. I definitely can’t finish the entire book. but let’s skip the lesbegue measure parts for now :/. I would then move to linear algebra for next month, and then abstract algebra after that. sort of embarassing to still work on the very same things even now… but gotta do it… and it’s just that i have worked on some other essential things which will come in handy soon…

recall - the manifolds notes, the cv consolidation, the JavaScript, the webpage, the ideas of series, gauge theory…. these were things I initiated and made a lot of progress in, apart from self-studying math!

remember this year is for “building beyond boundaries”… so let’s go. two mmore months of this final madness, and then I can start exploring the more advanced stuff… and start applying to academic places… next year’s situation is still uncertain…something I need to plan and think about… so i need to assign some time for that… let’s see…

Art $\times$ Science
